svg.title: LithePG app icon and LithePGApp product restore evidence
svg.desc: Visual evidence for restoring the LithePGApp executable product after the single-binary refactor and adding the bundled AppIcon.icns with verifier enforcement.
svg.text: LithePG app icon + packaging product restore
2026-06-10 — AppIcon.icns bundled and gated; LithePGApp product restored

g.text: bundle lacked Resources/AppIcon.icns; verifier accepted icon-less bundles
build_and_run.sh installs AppIcon.icns + CFBundleIconFile; verifier fails closed
LithePGApp executable product restored via LithePGAppUI library split
swift test 127/20 suites; all release helper tests; dogfood gate passed

svg.text: build_and_run failed: app icon asset missing / package verification failed: app icon must be a regular file
